mapper.select: select distinct pro_no, pro_name, pro_writer, ord_date from orders join order_detail using(ord_no) join product using(pro_no) where mem_id = #{id} and ord_status = '배송완료'
mapper.insert:
select rev_seq.nextval from dual
insert into review values(#{revNo}, #{revContent}, default, sysdate, sysdate, default, #{memId}, #{proNo})

insert all
into attachment values(att_new, #{item.attRename}, default, #{item.attFno}, #{item.attCategory}, #{item.attBno})
select * from dual
mapper.select: select count(*) from review where rev_status = 'Y'

select * from (select rev_no, rev_content, rev_count, rev_create_date, rev_modify_date, rev_status, mem_id, pro_no, pro_name, pro_writer, pro_image, mem_nickname, mem_filename, case when a.att_no is not null then 'Y' else 'N' end as has_attm, (select count(*) from review_like rl where rl.rev_no = r.rev_no) as rev_like, row_number() over (partition by r.rev_no order by r.rev_no desc) as rn from review r join member using (mem_id) join product using (pro_no) left join attachment a on r.rev_no = a.att_bno where rev_status = 'Y') where rn = 1 order by rev_no desc

select count(*) from product
where pro_name like '%'||#{keyword}||'%' or pro_writer like '%'||#{keyword}'%'
where pro_name like '%'||#{keyword}||'%'
where pro_writer like '%'||#{keyword}||'%'

select rev_no, pro_no, pro_name, pro_writer, pro_image from review join product using(pro_no)
pro_no = pro_no
and (pro_name like '%'||#{keyword}||'%' or pro_writer like '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
and pro_name like '%'||#{keyword}||'%'
and pro_writer like '%'||#{keyword}||'%'
mapper.update: update attachment set att_fno = 0 where att_no = (select min(att_no) from attachment where att_bno = #{revNo})
mapper.delete: delete review_like where rev_no = #{revNo} and mem_id = #{memId}
mapper.select: select * from (select rev_no, rev_content, rev_count, rev_create_date, rev_modify_date, rev_status, mem_id, pro_no, pro_name, pro_writer, pro_image, mem_nickname, mem_filename, case when a.att_no is not null then 'Y' else 'N' end as has_attm, (select count(*) from review_like rl where rl.rev_no = r.rev_no) as rev_like, row_number() over (partition by r.rev_no order by r.rev_no desc) as rn from review r join member using (mem_id) join product using (pro_no) left join attachment a on r.rev_no = a.att_bno where rev_status = 'Y') where rn = 1 order by rev_no desc
